name: dynamic-verse-4d-world-modeling
description: Physically-aware multimodal framework for 4D world modeling and generation
content:
## DynamicVerse: 4D World Framework

### Core Concept

This skill implements techniques from paper arXiv:2512.03000 for improving agent reasoning, adaptation, and decision-making in complex tasks.

### Implementation

See paper for implementation details: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.03000

### Practical Guidance

Key techniques from this paper can enhance agent capabilities in:
- Reasoning under uncertainty
- Adaptive learning
- Multi-step planning
- Robustness and generalization

Refer to the paper's methodology sections for specific implementation guidance.
